banner_subtitle: Mobile developer since 2017. I turn ideas into polished, high-performing Android & iOS apps—or improve the ones you already have.
banner_desc: From new apps built from scratch, to bug fixing and taking over existing projects—across e-learning, fintech, healthcare, news and more.
meet_subtitle: I help businesses and startups bring their app ideas to life—or make existing apps better. Whether you need a brand-new mobile app, improvements to an existing product, or expert advice on your mobile strategy, I've got you covered.
service1_desc: Turn your idea into a polished Android and iOS app, from design to launch.
service2_desc: Take over an existing codebase, add features, boost performance and ratings.
service3_desc: Squash bugs, ship updates, and keep your app running smoothly.
service4_desc: Get expert advice on architecture, app store publishing, and growth.
mf_feature1: Companion app for Milano Finanza web platform
mf_feature2: Users can consume news, video articles, podcasts, financial data and more
mf_feature3: Features include app-wide PiP, ad management including video ads, real time notifications
qa_feature1: Video courses, webinars, quizzes and exams for a large content catalog
qa_feature2: Shipped features: reworked download system, interactive quizzes, home widget
qa_feature3: Increased MAU by 117%, daily downloads by 150%, review score from 3.5 to 4.5 over 6 months
emid_feature1: Two distinct apps: one for health data, one for first-aid personnel
emid_feature2: Uses face recognition technology for patient identification in first-aid scenarios
emid_feature3: Built with KMP for a shared core layer across iOS and Android
wclock_feature1: Simple, lightweight app to check local time, weather, and attractions worldwide
wclock_feature2: Personal project, first Android-only then rewritten in Flutter for iOS
wclock_feature3: 300k+ total downloads, 2k daily users, average rating of 4.6/5
lac_feature2: App-wide PiP, videos and video ads, TikTok-style video view
klearn_feature1: An exciting way to learn Chinese with karaoke-style lessons
klearn_feature2: Built from scratch using state-of-the-art frameworks and technologies
klearn_feature3: Gamification with leaderboards, level system and rewards to boost engagement
avq_feature1: Innovative banking app connecting relationship managers with bank clients
avq_feature2: Features AI NLP-based chat suggestions and integration with social apps (WhatsApp, WeChat, etc.)
avq_feature3: Both versions leverage latest UI frameworks (SwiftUI, Jetpack Compose)
contact_lead: Get in touch to start a conversation about your project. You can expect a response within 1-2 business days.
contact_desc: Use the contact form to send me a message, or reach out directly via email. If you'd prefer a live conversation, book a video call at your convenience.
form_success: Message sent! I'll get back to you shortly.
form_error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email me directly.
